results.title: Pembrolizumab vs Placebo in Advanced Melanoma
results.snippet: A randomized, double-blind trial comparing pembrolizumab with placebo in patients with advanced melanoma after surgical resection.

results.title: Nivolumab + Ipilimumab in BRAF-Mutated Melanoma
results.snippet: Evaluating combination immunotherapy in patients with BRAF V600 mutated unresectable melanoma.

results.title: Adjuvant Tumor Infiltrating Lymphocytes for Stage III Melanoma
results.snippet: Adjuvant treatment with expanded TIL therapy following surgical resection in Stage III melanoma patients.
